assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: The file contains a '## Repository Registry' section with correct headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) on line 20, but it includes a data row on line 22: '| my-project | Web application | -- | ./ |'. The assertion requires either no data rows or an explicit note that no repositories are configured. Neither condition is met -- a data row is present and there is no note about no repositories being configured.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 25-28 of claude-md-result.md contain: '## Jira Configuration' followed by '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'. All three required values are present and correct.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: Line 30 contains '## Code Intelligence' and line 32 states 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' Line 36 also reinforces: 'No limitations known -- no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: Line 18 of discovery-log.md states: '**No Serena MCP tools found** -- no tools matching the `mcp__<instance>__find_symbol` / `mcp__<instance>__get_symbols_overview` pattern'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: Line 29 states '**No Atlassian MCP tools found**'. Lines 33-34 state 'User chose: **Option 2 -- Skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually**'. Lines 36-42 document 'Step 3.4 -- Manual Entry' with user-provided values for Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001).

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 19-20 of discovery-log.md state: 'Informed user: no Serena MCP servers were found' followed by 'User chose: **Continue without code intelligence**'. This documents that the user was prompted and chose to continue without code intelligence.
